section_title: If a third person wrongfully deprives the bailee of the use or possession
content:
180. If a third person wrongfully deprives the bailee of the use or possession
bailor or
of the goods bailed, or does them any injury, the baliee is entitled to use such
bailee
against remedies as the owner might have used in the like case if no bailment had
wrong-doer
been made; and either the bailor or the bailee may bring a suit against a third
person for such deprivation or injury.
Apportionment
